title: hippion viscosum
intro: Hippion viscosum, also known as the sticky mouse-ear or sticky mouse ear cress, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hippion viscosum include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and soothe digestive issues. Hippion viscosum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it can also be used in salves and ointments to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
